calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, and CSR: Brenda Fields.
Arnold Evje, II; Esq. for Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority present by Jessie Ranford; the property manager. Defendants, Verna Stitt and Demario Holmes present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement by stipulation. Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows: Stipulation to enter Judgment or Upon Fulfillment of Condition, Dismissal of the case with prejudice. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendants for restitution and possession of 48 Cameron Way, San Francisco, CA. Forfeiture of the rental agreement, back rent and damages of $1,766.00 through 6-30-03 & issuance of an immediate WRIT of possession for the premises with NO STAY. Defendant will be allowed to remain in possession of the premises under the following conditions: Payment of $244.00 to Plaintiff's agent on of before 6-20-03, $1,100.00 on or before 7-3-03. Balance of $422.00 by installments of $122 plus monthly rent of $61.00 starting 8-1-03. If Defendant complies, Plaintiff to dismissed with prejudice. If defendanat fails, Plaintiff may so state by EX PARTE declaration, with 24 hours notice to defendant and have judgment entered, with no stay for any reason. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside, vacate any judgment, stay of execution or relief from forfeiture. Each party waives any claim against the other and generally releases the other from all claims. If defendant is evicted, any personal property left at the premises is deemed abandoned and may be disposed of by the Plaintiff. Defendant represents that there is no one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees. All parties agreed to the settlement in open court. The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
